steading.notLinked: No Stonetop steading linked. Drag a Stonetop actor onto this sheet to link it.

outfit.title: Outfit
outfit.description: When you prepare for an expedition in a friendly community, mark which items you wish to carry.
outfit.loadHeavy: Heavy load (7–9 ◆) — noisy, slow, quick to tire

arcana.empty: Drag arcana here from the Arcana compendium.
arcana.identifyConfirm: Are you sure you you've successfully identified this Arcanum? This action cannot be undone.
arcana.unidentifiedText: This arcanum has not yet been identified. Study it closely to reveal its nature.

inventory.regularItemsNote: Use supplies to Recover, Make Camp, or have extra small items.
inventory.smallItemsNote:
Fit in a pocket, pouch, or boot.

When you Outfit, mark □ below equal to 4+Prosperity.
inventory.smallItemsNoteWithLimit:
Fit in a pocket, pouch, or boot.

When you Outfit, mark □ below equal to {limit} (4+Prosperity).
inventory.resetConfirm: Clear all item selections and load level? Supply pools are not affected.
inventory.regularUndefinedPoolNote: When you Have What You Need, move ◆ from here to ◇ below.
inventory.smallUndefinedPoolNote: When you Have What You Need, move ◆ from here to items below, or expend supplies to mark an additional ◇.

outfit.heading: When you Outfit, mark a number of ◇ below on specific items or as a group.
outfit.light: For a light load (quick & quiet), mark up to 3 ◆
outfit.heavy: For a heavy load (noisy, slow, hot, quick to tire), mark 7–9 ◆

hideRollMode.name: Hide Roll Mode on Move Rolls
hideRollMode.hint: When enabled, move rolls ignore the actor's saved advantage/disadvantage and roll without a roll mode modifier.

expandMoveDescriptions.name: Expand Move Descriptions
expandMoveDescriptions.hint: Show move descriptions expanded by default on character sheets.

defaultSheetTab.name: Default Sheet Tab
defaultSheetTab.hint: Which tab the character sheet opens to by default.

moves.pickInstruction: Pick up to {count} moves to start with.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.instruction: Choose 1 on each line, or make something up:

origin.label: Origin
origin.instruction: Stonetop is your home, or close enough, but where are you (or your family) from originally? Pick 1 and a name to match (or make up something similar).
